Thank you for being a CityBike member for the past year. Your membership is due to expire on August 31. Renew before August 15 and you will receive two months free — that is, fourteen months of unlimited rides for the price of twelve.

To renew, simply log in to your account and select "Renew Now." Your current payment method will be charged automatically unless you update it.

We look forward to keeping you riding.

The CityBike Team

questions.question: What is the purpose of the e-mail?
options: To introduce a new bicycle model
questions.explanation: 信中主旨是提醒會員資格 8 月 31 日到期，並提供 8 月 15 日前續約送兩個月的優惠，屬於鼓勵提前續約。
questions.tip: 目的題看第一段：Renew before August 15 and you will receive two months free。

questions.question: What will happen if Ms. Moreno renews before August 15?
options: She will get a discount on a new bike
She will receive fourteen months for the price of twelve
Her payment method will be deleted
questions.explanation: 優惠內容明確寫出：fourteen months of unlimited rides for the price of twelve（付十二個月的錢享十四個月）。
questions.tip: 數字改寫題：two months free 被改寫成 14 個月付 12 個月的錢。

passages.label: 公告 (Notice)
passages.text:
GRAND OPENING — RIVERSIDE FARMERS' MARKET

Starting Saturday, May 3, the Riverside Farmers' Market will operate every Saturday from 8:00 A.M. to 1:00 P.M. in Waterfront Park.

More than forty local vendors will offer fresh produce, baked goods, flowers, and handmade crafts. Parking is limited; visitors are encouraged to use the free shuttle from Central Station, which runs every fifteen minutes during market hours.

Vendors interested in a stall for the summer season should apply online by April 18.

questions.question: How often will the market take place?
questions.explanation: 公告寫 every Saturday，也就是每週一次。
questions.tip: every Saturday 改寫成 once a week，頻率題常這樣換句話說。

questions.question: What are visitors encouraged to do?
questions.explanation: 因停車位有限，公告鼓勵訪客搭乘 Central Station 出發、每 15 分鐘一班的免費接駁車。
questions.tip: encouraged to 原文照抄在題目裡，回文中找同字即可定位。

questions.question: What should interested vendors do by April 18?
questions.explanation: 最後一段：想擺攤的攤商應在 4 月 18 日前線上申請（apply online）。
questions.tip: 日期通常只出現一次，找到 April 18 那句就是答案來源。

passages.label: 簡訊串 (Text-message chain)
passages.text:
Diego Ramos (10:12 A.M.)
Lena, the projector in Room 5 isn't working and my client demo starts at 11.

Lena Park (10:13 A.M.)
Oh no. Did you try the spare cable in the cabinet?

Diego Ramos (10:15 A.M.)
Yes, still nothing. I think the bulb is gone.

Lena Park (10:16 A.M.)
Then take the portable projector from the storage room. I'll let facilities know about Room 5.

Diego Ramos (10:17 A.M.)
Lifesaver. I owe you a coffee.

questions.question: What problem does Mr. Ramos have?
options: He lost a storage room key
questions.explanation: 第一則訊息就說 Room 5 的投影機壞了，而 11 點有客戶展示。
questions.tip: 簡訊題的問題點幾乎都在第一、二則訊息。

questions.question: At 10:17 A.M., what does Mr. Ramos most likely mean when he writes, 'Lifesaver'?
options: He is grateful for the suggestion
He wants to buy new equipment
He is worried about being late
questions.explanation: Lena 提出拿行動投影機的解法後，Diego 回 Lifesaver（救星）並說要請咖啡，表達感謝。
questions.tip: 語意題（most likely mean）看前一則訊息：有人幫忙解決問題，故為感謝。

passages.label: 廣告 (Advertisement)
passages.text:
SUMMIT OFFICE FURNITURE — CLEARANCE EVENT

For one week only, June 9–15, save up to 60% on floor models and discontinued lines at our Fairview showroom.

• Ergonomic chairs from $89
• Standing desks from $199
• Meeting tables, bookcases, and more

All clearance items are sold as-is and cannot be returned. Free delivery within the city on purchases over $500. Doors open at 9:00 A.M.; selection is limited, so arrive early.

questions.question: What is indicated about the clearance items?
options: They can be returned within a week
They are sold in their current condition
questions.explanation: 廣告載明 All clearance items are sold as-is and cannot be returned，即以現況出售、不可退貨。
questions.tip: as-is（現況出售）是廣告常見字，等於 in their current condition。

questions.question: How can a customer receive free delivery?
options: By ordering during the first day
questions.explanation: Free delivery within the city on purchases over $500：市區內消費滿 500 美元免運。
questions.tip: 條件題找 on purchases over／with any purchase 之類的片語。

questions.question: Why should customers arrive early?
options: A gift is offered to early birds
questions.explanation: 結尾寫 selection is limited, so arrive early：數量有限所以要早到。
questions.tip: so 前面是原因、後面是建議；題目問原因就看 so 前面。

passages.label: 新聞報導 (Article)
passages.text:
HARLOW GAZETTE — Business Briefs

Local roastery Bean & Vine will open its second café next month in the renovated Mill District, the company announced Tuesday. The original location near City Hall opened just three years ago and quickly became known for its single-origin coffees and weekend tasting classes.

Founder Priya Shah said the new café will seat sixty guests, twice the capacity of the original, and will include a small training lab where staff from both locations can practice new brewing techniques.

The Mill District has attracted a dozen new businesses since the riverfront renovation was completed last year.

questions.question: What is the article mainly about?
options: A coffee company opening a new location
questions.explanation: 報導主題是 Bean & Vine 下個月將在 Mill District 開第二家分店。
questions.tip: 主旨題看第一句（lead sentence），新聞寫作重點都放最前面。

questions.question: What is suggested about the new café?
options: It will be smaller than the original
It will hold twice as many guests as the original
It will only serve staff members
questions.explanation: 新店可容納六十人，是原店的兩倍（twice the capacity of the original）。
questions.tip: 比較題抓 twice／double 等倍數字眼。

questions.question: What happened in the Mill District last year?
questions.explanation: 最後一段：自去年河岸整修完工後，Mill District 已吸引十多家新商家進駐。
questions.tip: last year 是定位詞，回文找同樣的時間詞。

passages.label: 第一篇：邀請函 (Invitation)
passages.text:
You are invited!
NORTHGATE CHAMBER OF COMMERCE — ANNUAL NETWORKING DINNER

Date: Thursday, October 12
Time: 6:30 P.M. – 9:30 P.M.
Venue: Grand Ballroom, Hotel Aurelia

Keynote speaker: Dana Okafor, author of "The Connected Company"
Tickets: $75 for members / $110 for non-members
Tables of eight may be reserved at a 10% discount.

Please RSVP to events@northgatechamber.org by October 2.

passages.label: 第二篇：電子郵件 (E-mail)
passages.text:
From: Miguel Santos, Santos Logistics
To: events@northgatechamber.org
Date: September 28
Subject: Annual dinner reservation

Hello,

I would like to reserve a full table for my management team at the dinner on October 12. As our company joined the Chamber in July, please apply the member rate along with the table discount.

Also, could you seat us near the stage if possible? Two of my team members have some hearing difficulty and would appreciate being close to the speaker.

Best regards,
Miguel Santos

questions.question: What is indicated about the dinner?
options: It is held at the Chamber office
questions.explanation: 邀請函載明主講人為《The Connected Company》作者 Dana Okafor。
questions.tip: indicated 題逐項對回原文刪去，keynote speaker 一行可直接對到。

questions.question: How many people are on Mr. Santos's reservation?
questions.explanation: 他要訂 a full table，而邀請函寫 Tables of eight——整桌即八人。此題需要兩篇資訊互相對照。
questions.tip: 雙篇題經典手法：數字在第一篇（tables of eight）、需求在第二篇（a full table）。

questions.question: What discount will Mr. Santos most likely receive in total?
options: Member rate plus the table discount
questions.explanation: 他們公司七月加入商會（具會員資格），又訂整桌（適用桌位九折），所以兩種優惠皆可用。
questions.tip: 資格判斷題：把第二篇的條件（joined in July＝會員）帶回第一篇的價目規則。

questions.question: What special request does Mr. Santos make?
options: A signed copy of a book
questions.explanation: 他請主辦方盡量安排靠近舞台的座位，因為兩位團隊成員聽力不佳。
questions.tip: request 題找 could you...? 句型。

questions.question: By when should guests respond to the invitation?
questions.explanation: 邀請函最後一行：Please RSVP ... by October 2。
questions.tip: RSVP by＋日期是邀請函固定考點。

passages.label: 第一篇：訂單確認 (Order confirmation)
passages.text:
OFFICEPRO SUPPLIES — ORDER #88214
Order date: March 3 | Estimated delivery: March 7

Ship to: Hannah Lee, Suite 400, 251 Birch Avenue

Item                             Qty    Price
A4 copy paper (10-ream case)      3     $135
Toner cartridge, black (TN-450)   2      $98
Desk organizer, walnut            1      $32
---------------------------------------------
Subtotal                                $265
Shipping (standard)                      $12
Total                                   $277

Orders over $300 qualify for free standard shipping.

passages.label: 第二篇：電子郵件 (E-mail)
passages.text:
From: Hannah Lee
To: support@officeprosupplies.com
Date: March 7
Subject: Order #88214 — missing item

Hello,

My order arrived yesterday, one day early, which I appreciated. However, only one toner cartridge was in the box although I was charged for two. Could you send the missing cartridge or refund the difference?

Also, I plan to place a larger order next month for our new branch. If I add more paper to reach $300, will the shipping fee be waived?

Thank you,
Hannah Lee

questions.question: When did the order actually arrive?
questions.explanation: 信件日期為 3 月 7 日，信中說 arrived yesterday（昨天到貨）＝ 3 月 6 日；且 one day early 與預計到貨日 3 月 7 日相符——提早一天即 3 月 6 日，兩條線索互相印證。
questions.tip: 雙篇日期題把日期都列出來推算：預計 3/7（第一篇）、信件 3/7、yesterday＝3/6。

questions.question: What problem does Ms. Lee report?
questions.explanation: 她訂購並付款兩個碳粉匣，箱內卻只有一個，要求補寄或退差額。
questions.tip: problem 題找 However 之後的句子。

questions.question: What does Ms. Lee ask about her next order?
options: Whether she can get free shipping
Whether walnut organizers are in stock
Whether she can pay by invoice
questions.explanation: 她問若加購紙張讓金額達 300 美元，運費是否可免——對應第一篇「滿 300 美元免標準運費」的規定。
questions.tip: 雙篇對照：第二篇的問題（reach $300）呼應第一篇的優惠條款。

questions.question: How much did Ms. Lee pay for shipping?
questions.explanation: 訂單明細載明 Shipping (standard) $12；因訂單 265 美元未達 300 門檻，不符合免運。
questions.tip: 金額題直接讀表格行：Shipping $12。

questions.question: In the e-mail, the word "waived" is closest in meaning to
questions.explanation: waive a fee＝免除費用，選 canceled（取消／免除）最接近。
questions.tip: 同義詞題把選項代回原句試讀：will the fee be canceled? 語意通順即對。

reading7.typeLabel: 三篇：徵才＋履歷信＋面試通知

passages.label: 第一篇：徵才廣告 (Job posting)
passages.text:
MARKETING COORDINATOR — Lakeview Resorts (Head Office, Kelowna)

Lakeview Resorts operates twelve lakeside hotels across western Canada. We seek a marketing coordinator to manage social media accounts, draft newsletters, and support seasonal campaigns.

Requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in marketing or a related field
• At least two years of marketing experience (hospitality industry preferred)
• Excellent writing skills; French is an asset

Send a résumé and cover letter to careers@lakeviewresorts.ca by January 20. Interviews will be held in early February.

passages.label: 第二篇：求職信 (Cover letter)
passages.text:
Dear Hiring Committee,

Please consider my application for the marketing coordinator position. I hold a bachelor's degree in communications and have spent the past three years managing digital campaigns for a boutique hotel group in Montreal, where I wrote guest newsletters in both English and French.

I will relocate to Kelowna in January and am available to interview any time after the fifteenth.

Sincerely,
Claire Beaumont

passages.label: 第三篇：電子郵件 (E-mail)
passages.text:
From: careers@lakeviewresorts.ca
To: Claire Beaumont
Date: January 27
Subject: Interview invitation

Dear Ms. Beaumont,

Thank you for your application. We would like to invite you to an interview on Tuesday, February 4, at 10:00 A.M. at our head office. The interview will include a thirty-minute writing exercise.

Please bring two professional references and confirm your attendance by Friday.

Best regards,
Ruth Feldman, Human Resources

questions.question: What is one duty of the advertised position?
questions.explanation: 徵才廣告職責第一項就是 manage social media accounts。
questions.tip: duty 題對照廣告的職責列表（動詞開頭那幾行）。

questions.question: What is suggested about Ms. Beaumont?
options: She has a degree in hospitality
questions.explanation: 廣告寫 French is an asset；她在求職信提到以英法雙語撰寫電子報，符合此加分條件。
questions.tip: 三篇題最常考「條件對照」：廣告要求 ↔ 求職者條件。

questions.question: How does Ms. Beaumont exceed one of the job requirements?
options: She has three years of experience instead of two
questions.explanation: 要求至少兩年行銷經驗，她有三年（the past three years）。
questions.tip: exceed＝超過門檻，找數字比較：required two years vs. her three years。

questions.question: What will happen on February 4?
options: Ms. Beaumont will start her new job
An interview with a writing exercise will be held
questions.explanation: 第三篇：2 月 4 日上午十點面試，含三十分鐘的寫作測驗。
questions.tip: 日期定位到第三篇 E-mail，事件就在同一句。

questions.question: What is Ms. Beaumont asked to bring to the interview?
questions.explanation: 信末要求 bring two professional references 並在週五前確認出席。
questions.tip: asked to bring 找 Please bring 開頭的句子。
